india.approval_notes: First-line antidiabetic. Widely available as generic.
india.restrictions: Prescription only. Contraindicated in renal impairment (eGFR <30).
india.special_requirements: Monitor renal function. Suspend before contrast media procedures.

usfda.bbw_detail: Lactic acidosis risk. Contraindicated in renal impairment.

ema.notes: Approved for T2DM. Preferred agent in EU guidelines.

mhra.notes: POM. Widely available in UK generic market.

metformin.new_formulation_notes: Excellent regulatory pathway. API well-characterised. Novel delivery systems (ODT, nanoparticles) require full CTD dossier.

india.approval_notes: Calcium channel blocker. Widely used for hypertension.
india.special_requirements: Caution in hepatic impairment. Grapefruit interaction.

amlodipine.new_formulation_notes: Oral liquid formulation would require new strength approval. Fixed-dose combinations common in India.

india.approval_notes: Most prescribed statin in India. Multiple generic manufacturers.
india.special_requirements: Monitor LFTs. Myopathy risk with concurrent drugs.

ema.notes: Approved for hypercholesterolemia and CV risk reduction.

atorvastatin.new_formulation_notes: Chewable or dispersible tablet opportunity. FDC with ezetimibe approved in India.

india.approval_notes: First PPI approved in India. Very high usage.
india.restrictions: Prescription only. Long-term use: monitor Mg2+, B12.
india.special_requirements: Enteric-coating essential due to acid lability.

omeprazole.new_formulation_notes: Pediatric formulation (oral suspension/granules) is a significant gap. Enteric-coating tech is mandatory for new oral forms.

india.approval_notes: ACE inhibitor for hypertension and heart failure.
india.special_requirements: Monitor potassium, renal function. Risk of angioedema.

usfda.bbw_detail: Fetal toxicity — discontinue if pregnancy detected.

ema.notes: Approved for hypertension, heart failure, post-MI.

lisinopril.new_formulation_notes: Oral solution formulation is an opportunity for pediatric/elderly use. ACE inhibitors have well-established regulatory dossier requirements.

india.approval_notes: Most widely used analgesic/antipyretic. OTC availability.

paracetamol.new_formulation_notes: Novel delivery (transdermal, buccal) requires full bridging studies. Extended-release formulations approved in some markets.

india.approval_notes: Macrolide antibiotic. High usage for respiratory infections.
india.special_requirements: QTc prolongation risk. Monitor ECG in high-risk patients.

ema.notes: Approved for respiratory, skin, and STI indications.

azithromycin.new_formulation_notes: Ophthalmic formulation approved in some markets. Extended-release oral formulation is a commercial opportunity.

india.approval_notes: Second-generation PPI. Very high prescription volume.
india.special_requirements: Enteric-coating mandatory. Monitor Mg2+ with long-term use.

pantoprazole.new_formulation_notes: Oral suspension/granules formulation for pediatric use is a regulatory gap in India. Enteric-coating is a prerequisite for oral forms.

india.schedule: Schedule H (Rx) / OTC in some states
india.restrictions: Schedule H — prescription required. OTC in 10mg strength in some regions.

cetirizine.new_formulation_notes: Orally disintegrating tablet (ODT) and nasal spray are emerging delivery opportunities. OTC dossier pathway available.

india.approval_notes: High-intensity statin. Growing market share vs atorvastatin.
india.restrictions: Prescription only. Avoid in pregnancy. Dose reduce in Asian patients.
india.special_requirements: Monitor CK, LFTs. Interaction with warfarin.

ema.notes: Approved for hypercholesterolemia and CVD risk reduction.

rosuvastatin.new_formulation_notes: Oral disintegrating tablet and pediatric formulations are regulatory opportunities. Dose-specific concerns in Asian populations documented in FDA label.
